description: veb is the web framework in V's standard library (multi-threaded, built-in HTTP/1.1 server). JSON responses are built without per-request reflection (precomputed item prefixes + manual serialization); async-db uses the stdlib db.pg pooled Go-style DB (db.exec_param_many over a connection pool sized from DATABASE_MAX_CONN). Built on pinned V master c0624b274 with the default GC (Boehm). Note: the baseline profile is not subscribed because veb does not decode chunked request bodies.
